title: P hacking
script_summary: Explains p hacking and its implications in scientific research.

segments.voiceover: Science has a clearer story about p hacking than social media does.
P hacking is manipulating data to achieve statistically significant results.
Researchers might change data points or test conditions to find that magical p-value.
Studies suggest that nearly 30% of research may have p hacking.
This compromises trust in science. Accurate reporting matters.
Stay informed. Follow for more insights on science.

full_voiceover: Science has a clearer story about p hacking than social media does. P hacking is manipulating data to achieve statistically significant results. Researchers might change data points or test conditions to find that magical p-value. Studies suggest that nearly 30% of research may have p hacking. This compromises trust in science. Accurate reporting matters. Stay informed. Follow for more insights on science.
